creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
If it makes life any easier and simplifies this port I see that as of 1.1.4 they are now including FreeBSD support. You can see that here:

https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/xerial/snappy/snappy-java/1.1.4/snappy-java-1.1.4.jar


However that would still alienate every other architecture...
